'''nazhomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mfr|mfr]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-zh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mfr|mfr]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nazhomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næzhemeth|næzhemeth]] || [[word:næzhemej|næzhemej]] || [[word:næzhemesh|næzhemesh]] || [[word:næzheme|næzheme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nazhozhomoth|nazhozhomoth]] || [[word:nazhozhomoj|nazhozhomoj]] || [[word:nazhozhomosh|nazhozhomosh]] || [[word:nazhozhomo|nazhozhomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nazhomoth|nazhomoth]] || [[word:nazhomoj|nazhomoj]] || [[word:nazhomosh|nazhomosh]] || [[word:nazhomo|nazhomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nazhofmoth|nazhofmoth]] || [[word:nazhofmoj|nazhofmoj]] || [[word:nazhofmosh|nazhofmosh]] || [[word:nazhofmof|nazhofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nazhomotho|nazhomotho]] || [[word:nazhomojo|nazhomojo]] || [[word:nazhomosho|nazhomosho]] || [[word:nazhomoko|nazhomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nazhomoth|nazhomoth]] || [[word:nazhomoj|nazhomoj]] || [[word:nazhomosh|nazhomosh]] || [[word:nazhomo|nazhomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nazhomothol|nazhomothol]] || [[word:nazhomojol|nazhomojol]] || [[word:nazhomoshol|nazhomoshol]] || [[word:nazhomokol|nazhomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nazhomothotho|nazhomothotho]] || [[word:nazhomojojo|nazhomojojo]] || [[word:nazhomoshosho|nazhomoshosho]] || [[word:nazhomoko|nazhomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nazhomothon|nazhomothon]] || [[word:nazhomojon|nazhomojon]] || [[word:nazhomoshon|nazhomoshon]] || [[word:nazhomokon|nazhomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nazhomothoro|nazhomothoro]] || [[word:nazhomojoro|nazhomojoro]] || [[word:nazhomoshoro|nazhomoshoro]] || [[word:nazhomokoro|nazhomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
